subcodes.first_line: O Rahman! The Beloved of the worlds doth turn His face toward thee from the Most Great Prison and maketh mention of thee, and this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رحمن محبوب عالمیان در سجن اعظم بتو توجه نموده و تو را ذکر مینماید و این
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
